name: Flexible Cystoscopy
description: Diagnostic examination of the bladder using a thin, flexible camera.
preOperativeInstructions: No fasting required. Drink plenty of water before the procedure. You may drive yourself home.
postOperativeInstructions: Drink plenty of fluids. Mild burning when urinating is normal for 24-48 hours. Avoid strenuous activity and heavy lifting for 24-48 hours, and avoid caffeine/alcohol for 48 hours.
expectedOutcomes: Immediate diagnostic results. Minimal discomfort. Return to normal activities within 24-48 hours.

uiCustomization.welcomeBody: This is a quick diagnostic procedure with minimal recovery time.

checklistOverrides.text: Drink at least 2 litres of water
Monitor urine for blood (light pink is normal)

commonConcerns.response: Local anaesthetic gel is used. Most patients report mild discomfort rather than pain.
Light pink urine for 24 hours is normal. Dark red blood or clots require medical attention.
